---
title: "EFA, CFA, CB-SEM, and PLS-SEM syntax generation"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{EFA, CFA, CB-SEM, and PLS-SEM syntax generation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(surveyframe)
```

Syntax generation is local and does not require `lavaan` or `seminr`.

```{r syntax}
agree5 <- sf_choices("agree5", 1:5,
  c("Strongly disagree", "Disagree", "Neutral", "Agree", "Strongly agree"))
items <- lapply(1:3, function(i) {
  sf_item(paste0("sat_", i), paste("Satisfaction", i),
    type = "likert", choice_set = "agree5", scale_id = "sat")
})
scale <- sf_scale("sat", "Satisfaction", paste0("sat_", 1:3))
instr <- sf_instrument("Service Survey", components = c(list(agree5), items, list(scale)))

cat(cfa_lavaan_syntax(instr))
```

```{r sem}
model <- sf_model(
  "model_1",
  type = "cb_sem",
  constructs = list(sf_construct("SAT", "Satisfaction", paste0("sat_", 1:3)))
)
cat(sem_lavaan_syntax(model, instr))
```

```{r pls}
pls <- sf_model(
  "pls_1",
  type = "pls_sem",
  constructs = list(
    sf_construct("SAT", "Satisfaction", paste0("sat_", 1:2),
      mode = "composite"),
    sf_construct("OUT", "Outcome", "sat_3", mode = "single_item")
  ),
  paths = list(sf_path("SAT", "OUT"))
)
cat(seminr_syntax(pls))
```
